events.content: Keep spawn broker scoped to invoking project: Keep spawn broker scoped to invoking project

raw.question: Keep spawn broker scoped to invoking project
raw.chosen: Keep spawn broker scoped to invoking project
raw.reasoning: The CLI --cwd option describes the spawned worker working directory; using it to choose the broker made agent-relay who connect to a different project scope and hide the spawned agent.

events.content: Found spawn persistence failure caused by two CLI-layer issues: autostart used owned SDK brokers that shutdown in finally, and --cwd selected the broker scope instead of only the worker cwd. Patched spawn to autostart a background broker and preserve current project broker scope.

retrospective.summary: Fixed agent-relay spawn persistence by autostarting a detached background broker for one-shot spawn commands and by treating --cwd as the spawned agent cwd rather than the broker project scope. Added a regression test for --cwd broker-scope behavior and verified with Vitest plus ESLint.
